query:
SELECT
            m.message_uuid,
            m.from_user_id,
            m.to_user_id,
            m.timestamp,
            mp.iv,
            mp.ciphertext
        FROM messages m
        JOIN message_payloads mp ON mp.message_id = m.id
        WHERE mp.device_id = $3
          AND m.timestamp < $4
          AND (
            (m.from_user_id = $1 AND m.to_user_id = $2)
            OR
            (m.from_user_id = $2 AND m.to_user_id = $1)
          )
        ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC
        LIMIT $5
